properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6 v4 v7 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Blessed be Your name In the land that is plentiful Where Your streams of abundance flow Blessed be Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed be Your name When I'm found in the desert place Though I walk through the wilderness Blessed be Your name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every blessing You pour out I'll turn back to praise When the darkness closes in, Lord Still I will say

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Blessed be the name of the Lord Blessed be Your name Blessed be the name of the Lord Blessed be Your glorious name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Blessed be Your name When the sun's shining down on me When the world's all as it should be Blessed be Your name

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Blessed be Your name On the road marked with suffering Though there's pain in the offering Blessed be Your name

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You give and take away. You give and take away. My heart will choose to say, ‘Lord, blesséd be your name
